description: You are a project manager at DevLabs addressing uneven workload distribution. Audit the open issues (status: New, In Progress, or Feedback) for developers bob.walker, carol.santos, david.kim, and grace.lee across all Redmine projects to identify the most-loaded and least-loaded individuals. Reassign the lowest priority 'New' status issue from the most-loaded developer to the least-loaded developer (if tied, choose bob.walker or grace.lee). On the reassigned issue, add the comment 'Workload rebalancing: reassigned to reduce team burnout. Previous assignee was over capacity.', log 0.5 hours of Design activity with the comment 'Sprint planning: workload rebalancing session.', and increase the estimated hours by 2.0 hours from its current value. Login credentials: admin / Admin1234!
